name: Eastfield Resources Ltd.
summary: Eastfield Resources Ltd., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Canada. It primarily explores for gold, copper, nickel, silver, molybdenum, cobalt, and platinum group metals. The company holds 100% interest in the Zymo, Iron Lake, Hidden One, and Big Valley properties; and 91.3% interest in the Indata property comprising 18 claims encompassing 3,189 hectares located in British Columbia. Eastfield Resources Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
